_note: Config for the ai-system pipeline (see ai-system/orchestrator). lint and test are DIFF-SCOPED via the {files} token: they only check the files a run changed, so duo-decide's pre-existing repo-wide debt (eslint error in generated expo-env.d.ts; 1 failing jest test; tsc errors in Supabase types + Deno edge fns) doesn't poison the code loop. prettier is scoped too so generated output matches the project's tab style. typecheck stays EMPTY: tsc is project-wide and can't be file-scoped, and the repo has pre-existing type debt — re-enable once the repo is green.

typecheck.optOut: tsc is project-wide (can't be diff-scoped via {files}) and the repo carries pre-existing type debt (~256 errors in Supabase types + Deno edge fns) — re-enable once the repo is green
